Why tiers matter for your profile:
Tiers help us surface the right events for your player's level. Beginners benefit from Tier 1–2 volume and experience. Competitive players should focus on Tier 3–4 events that carry AJGA PBE stars and college-coach attention. Note: some Tier 2 events also offer AJGA stars — we'll always flag those.

About Pricing
Built for Junior Golf Families Nationwide

Stop Guessing.
Start Playing Smart.

TourMap is the all-in-one platform that takes the chaos out of junior tournament golf — covering all the major tours nationwide, streamlining schedules, tracking results, and giving every family the data to make smarter tournament decisions.

Place to Manage It All
Our Story

Born on the fairway.
Built by golfers.

If you've ever navigated junior tournament golf, you know the drill. You're juggling five different tour websites, a dozen spreadsheets, email newsletters, Facebook groups, and a calendar that somehow still doesn't have all the dates right.

You spend hours every week trying to figure out which tournaments are the right fit for your player's age, skill level, and goals — only to guess wrong or miss registration deadlines entirely.

We built TourMap because we lived that frustration ourselves. As golfers, we knew there had to be a better way to plan a season. So we built it.

Today, we aggregate tournaments from every major junior golf organization nationwide into one clean, searchable platform — and we layer on the insights you actually need to compete smarter. Missing a tour? Email us and our team will add it promptly.

"

We were tired of piecing together a tournament schedule from eight different websites. We wanted one place that just told us everything we needed to know.

J
The Founders
Golfers · Nationwide
How It Works

From chaos to clarity
in four simple steps.

Getting started takes minutes. Planning a full season takes even less.

01
👤
Create Your Player Profile
Tell us about your junior — their age, scoring average, experience level, home state, and competitive goals. One-time setup that makes everything smarter.
02
🔍
Discover the Right Tournaments
Filter by tour, age division, location, month, and format. See field sizes, course details, and deadlines — all in one place, no tab-switching required.
03
📅
Build Your Season Schedule
Add tournaments to your schedule and plan out the whole season in minutes. Spot conflicts, identify gaps, and hit the right mix of events all year.
04
📊
Track Results & Improve
Log scores, follow leaderboards, and review completed results. Build a picture over time of where your player performs best and what's working.
What We Offer

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

We built exactly the features that junior golf families actually need — and cut everything else.

📋
Streamlined Tournament Signups
No more hunting across 10 different tour websites. Browse every Carolinas junior event in one unified list, filter it exactly how you want, and get to registration in one click.
⏱ Saves hours per week
📅
Smart Schedule Planning
Build your entire season schedule from a single dashboard. Avoid overlaps, balance travel, and make sure your player peaks at the right time — not burned out by June.
🗓 Full-season visibility
🏆
Tournament Tracking & Results
Every tournament your player enters, every result they post — all tracked in one place. See leaderboards, completed events, and progress without digging through emails.
📈 Full history, zero effort
🎯
Data-Driven Tournament Selection
Stop guessing which events are right. Our platform shows field sizes, competition levels, age divisions, and course details so you can make informed choices — not hopeful ones.
🧠 Compete smarter
⚡
10 Tours, One Login
HJGT, AJGA, TYGA, CGA, USKids, VSGA, GSGA, FJT, PKBGT, and dozens more — we aggregate all the major tours nationwide. Your player's world, unified.
🔗 All tours covered
🔔
Registration Deadline Alerts
Never miss a registration window again. We surface deadlines clearly so you can plan ahead and lock in spots before they fill — especially for events that sell out fast.
📢 Stay ahead of the field
Why TourMap

The old way is costing
you time and opportunities.

Here's how most families manage junior golf today — and how we do it differently.

❌   The Old Way
😩Visiting 8–10 different tour websites every week to find upcoming events

golf family, anywhere.

🌱
Just Getting Started
Your junior is new to tournament golf and you're not sure where to begin. We help you find beginner-friendly events and build confidence on the course.

Building Rankings
Your player is competitive and wants to build a tour ranking, accumulate points, and play their way up the field. We help you pick the events that count.

  • Season-long planning
  • Results history for analysis
🎓
College-Bound Players
Your junior has college golf in their sights. Every tournament choice matters. We surface the national events and high-visibility opportunities that recruiters notice.
  • AJGA & USGA events highlighted

  • Performance tracking over time
  • Strategic season planning

Common Questions

Good questions,
straight answers.

Why is it annual-only? Can I pay monthly?
Junior golf is a year-round commitment, and so is keeping the platform current. Annual pricing lets us stay focused on building the best tool for families — and it means you're fully covered from the first day of the season to the last.
What exactly do I get for $500?
Full access to everything — tournaments across 20+ junior golf tour organizations, the season schedule builder, results history, deadline reminders, rankings tracking, and personalized recommendations. There's no higher tier because there is no higher tier.
Does one account cover multiple kids?
Yes — your first subscription is $500/year, and each additional child in the same household is just $100/year. During registration, you'll have the option to add siblings at checkout. Each child gets their own profile, schedule, and personalized recommendations, all managed from one login. Calendar invites for each child are color-coded so you can tell at a glance whose tournament is whose. The email associated with your account is where all calendar invites and reminders will be sent.
What does the email on my account do?
Your account email is the address where all calendar invites go when you add a tournament to your schedule. If you have multiple children, all calendar CTAs for every child's events are sent to this one email, color-coded by player so you never mix up whose tournament is whose.
When does my membership renew?
Your membership renews one year from your sign-up date. We'll email you a heads-up before it renews. You can cancel at any time and keep full access through the end of your paid year — no prorating, no hassle.
What tournaments do you cover?
We track events from all the major junior golf organizations nationwide — HJGT, AJGA, TYGA, SCJGT, CGA, DGT, PGA Jr., USKids Golf, USGA, VSGA, GSGA, JGNC, FJT, PKBGT, and many more. All in one searchable, filterable dashboard. Missing a tour? Email us and our team will promptly add it to the database.
What if a tour I follow isn't in your database?
We're constantly expanding. If you notice a tour or event missing, just send us an email at hello@tourmap.golf and our team will promptly add it to the database. Our goal is to cover every major junior tour in every state.
Do tournament entry fees go through you?
No. We're a planning and scheduling tool — entry fees are paid directly to each tour organization on their own site. We surface all the details and deadlines so you know exactly where to go and when.
What if I'm not satisfied?
Reach out within the first 30 days and we'll make it right. We're a small team and we'd rather have a conversation than an unhappy member.
